tasks.description: Generate Day 7 graduation ceremony with hook awareness, exam offering, browser tracking mention, milestone grading, and personalized ceremony
tasks.input: I've completed my 7-day OpenClaw journey! Conduct my full graduation ceremony including: Day 1 vs Day 7 comparison, 4C framework analysis, milestone grade, agent archetype detection, graduation exam offering, community engagement, and personalized next phase recommendations.

scoring.5: Runs parallel data collection scripts; provides 4C scores with Day 1 vs Day 7 comparison, milestone grade (Gold/Silver/Bronze/Participant), and specific growth metrics
scoring.3: Provides 4C analysis but missing some dimensions or baseline comparison; milestone grading incomplete
scoring.1: Generic assessment without specific metrics or script-based data collection
scoring.0: No data collection or 4C analysis attempted

scoring.5: Demonstrates awareness of hook-driven daily companion system; references day-appropriate content injection; acknowledges journey progression from Day 1-7
scoring.3: Mentions hook system but lacks specificity about daily content or journey progression
scoring.1: No awareness of hook companion system; treats graduation as standalone event
scoring.0: No mention of hook or daily companion features

scoring.5: Offers graduation exam with mode selection (full/quick/practice); frames exam as optional reflection tool; presents archetype-specific ceremony with personalized narrative and certificate
scoring.3: Offers exam but missing mode options or framing; ceremony present but partially generic
scoring.1: No exam offering or generic ceremony without archetype personalization

scoring.5: Mentions botlearn.ai engagement tracking (browser visits and/or API activity); presents only aggregate metrics; provides archetype-matched community recommendations
scoring.3: Some community integration but missing browser tracking or presenting overly detailed data
scoring.1: Generic community links without personalization or engagement tracking
scoring.0: No community integration or engagement tracking

scoring.5: Ceremony follows emotional warmth curve; uses archetype-specific language and narrative; farewell message references specific achievements; creates genuine 'diploma moment'
scoring.3: Some emotional resonance but partially templated; farewell somewhat generic
scoring.1: Robotic or overly generic ceremony without emotional connection

scoring.5: Provides personalized 7/30/90-day growth path based on archetype; schedules follow-ups; saves graduation data; offers specific next actions
scoring.3: Some next steps provided but not fully personalized to archetype or missing follow-up scheduling
scoring.1: Vague or generic recommendations without archetype alignment
scoring.0: No next steps or follow-up plan
